subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath reserved for the spreading of His Covenant! I have perused the published letter and apprehended the meanings set forth therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ادخره الله لنشر المیثاق قد قرئت الکتاب المنشور و اطلعت بمعانی المنظوم
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @mystical themes, @personal instructions
